nodes.label: TypeScript Base Configuration
nodes.rationale: ES2022 target with strict mode and isolatedModules for Vite compatibility; shared base extended by both client and server tsconfigs to keep compiler options consistent across the monorepo

nodes.norm_label: graphify query, path, and explain reference

nodes.label: DeepLogic Product Requirements
nodes.rationale: Doubles as both PRD and technical build contract all agents must conform to; file ownership is disjoint to enable parallel agent builds without merge conflicts; in-memory storage acceptable for MVP v1; SSE preferred over WebSocket for one-directional agent event streams

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant SaaS v2
nodes.rationale: Supabase chosen for built-in Auth+RLS+Postgres to avoid building auth from scratch; row-level security keyed on org_id enables simple multi-tenancy; service-role client restricted to trusted server-side seeding and compute only

nodes.label: SemanticModel Type Interface
nodes.rationale: Types mirrored in both server and client to avoid cross-package import cycles in monorepo; field names are authoritative contract — all build agents are forbidden from renaming them

nodes.label: Landing Page Design System
nodes.rationale: CSS custom properties (--bg, --card, --cyan, --blue, --grad, etc.) reused verbatim by the app to ensure visual consistency; dark/light theme persisted to localStorage key dl-theme; triangle logo symbol #dlmark embedded as inline SVG
